item.dc:creator: Pluiz

item.title: TIL: cloudhiker. Stumble upon but not
item.description: Idk I thought y’all would enjoy this a lot. I sure am enjoying it. FP edit! I forgot I did this before bed and was like what do you MEAN I have comments on a post I made?! So holy shit wow can’t wait to read all the cool things I know waiting below. Thank you so much and I’m so glad y’all did enjoy this as much as I thought you would! If you haven’t already and have tried this let us all know what cool places you discovered. Here’s a list of stupid websites I used to really like but have changed dramatically or died. Plus some that are exactly the same. Iamwesome.com (it’s true) Iwastesomuchtime.com Iwastesomuchmoney.com Slowrobot.com Grouchyrabbit.com Jellotime.com BOREDHUMANS.COM/FALLING_SAND.PHP YOUREWELCOME My Life is Average (y’all remember that?) Dear blank please blank (I miss these being funny-yes a lot of this list is other websites developed by them) Turns out jellotime is now on artsy.net/artwork/rafael-rozendaal-jellotime-com :(
item.dc:creator: ozawaonline

item.title: Faye for Sci-Fi Day
item.description: Had to post Faye for this week's Imgur themed Sci Fi Day :D Cowboy Bebop is still one of my favorite neo-noir space Western anime Sci-Fi's ever :P And this cosplay is always a blast to wear. Also, just wanted to add, you just lost the game... I know... I'm evil :P Happy Sci-Fi week everybody.

item.title: Behind-the-Scenes photos from "Stargate SG-1" and "Stargate Atlantis"
item.description:
These photos come from Joseph Mallozzi, one of the original writers and producers of the show. https://www.reddit.com/user/JosephMallozzi/ @BaronDestructo
Don S. Davis eating a chocolate bar in Joseph Mallozi's office
One of the staff in a discussion with Mallozi (in the Ra helmet)
A blooper I forgot to include in yesterday's collection of SG-1 Outtakes https://imgur.com/gallery/QvbCbM1
Lots of hugs going 'round on set during the final day of shooting for "Atlantis"

item.title: Time for the unhinged XL Wednesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends. happy new year
crap i think i might be deaf
that's a weird name for a hearing aid
i'm sensing a theme going on..
nailed it
mmm hmm
i like the light side colors more than dark side
4 going on 44
cheezits always look good to me. oh and i can barely cook
always
genius. and totally looks like a normal rock
why do that though? silly.
"come for your girlfriend"
hell yeah i love sharks
people are always doing this
no
i grabbed this for the sign i have no idea what the anime reference is
that’s it for me.. have a great night gang!!

item.title: GOP Troy Nehls openly admits he won't help Biden solve the border crisis
item.description: Nehls goes on to say: "I'm not going to do it. Why would I? Chuck Schumer has had HR 2 on his desk since July. And he's done nothing with it". HR 2 is nothing more than Trump2.0 - Nehls knew it wouldn't pass the Senate. https://www.congress.gov/bill/118th-congress/house-bill/2

item.title: Meme for good
item.description: The teacher is Katie Rinderle and you can donate to support her: https://www.gofundme.com/f/help-katie-rinderle Get the book: https://larrikinhouse.com.au/products/my-shadow-is-purple Source: https://www.cnn.com/2023/08/16/us/georgia-teacher-gender-identity-book-termination-vote/index.html THANK YOU to people who have donated since I posted this meme: Robert - $5 Andrew - $5 Anonymous - $10 Peter - $5 Alane - $7 Mackenzie - $50 Eric - $20 Anonymous - $10 And THANK YOU to everyone who bought a copy of the book! This is a good cause to support!

item.title: You are NOT getting the Epstein client list!!!!
item.description: https://apnews.com/article/jeffrey-epstein-ghislaine-maxwell-virginia-giuffre-3af500d4788ad45301be426628846d71 Please, please, please everyone understand you are being DISTRACTED and misinformed!!! The list that people keep discussing regarding Epstein is NOT the client list. All we are getting is a list of people's names who were redacted in a defamation lawsuit that involved Epstein. The people named in it are likely nothing more than listed as 'names' that came up in some form of discussion, but are decidedly NOT the Epstein client list. For instance, where Jimmy Kimmel has been mentioned as being in the list. He may be! It is likely nothing more than something like "And while I was laying down watching Jimmy Kimmel I received a phone call where I was told that Virginia had made allegations against Epstein" and that's the extent of it. No one listed in the redactions is even confirmed to be a client. Stop being satisfied, or drooling over this list, and make demands of the FBI to release the actual CLIENT LIST that we deserve to get, fully unredacted, fully documented, and for prosecution to begin on it!
item.dc:creator: OnFridaysWeWearBeskar

item.dc:creator: Pasquinel

item.title: But I will still refer to myself as "ya boy" until the day I die
item.description: Storytime. I wrote a book last year. Some people read it for me. One person got back to me today, many months later. I won't go into too much detail, since their story isn't mine to tell, but they said my book wound up being important to them on their gender journey, and I was really touched. I always had some hangup about coming out publicly as nonbinary, but this really got me thinking about why. And I realized that my problem was never with me, or my gender, or any fear that I'd, like, go back on it or something. My worries were all with how the world would see and treat me. And I'm not responsible for the world. I'm responsible for me. And besides that, my therapist said I'm allowed to try on the identity to see if it fits. And the only way to try is to try, you know? So I just did it. They gave me the push I needed. If they could do what's best for them, then I can too. Anyway. Comment with your best nonbinary memes. I know they must exist, and I need to build up a stockpile.
item.dc:creator: MisterTeatime

item.dc:creator: Pasquinel

item.title: Red tape is designed to choke your spirit and drain your wallet
item.description: I've been with my wife in a LDR for many many years. (10+) We've managed to maintain a happy, relatively healthy relationship with semi-regular visits and we talk and sit together every day even for a little while when we're forced apart by immigration and red tape nonesense. I'm in the UK and she is in the US currently. I'm alone here. I don't have much family left and certainly less that I actively maintain a connection with. She has our animals and her family who she is close with and so, when asked to choose my poison, I'd sooner drink from the punchbowl of the US than walk through the emotional meatgrinder of the UK. Asking her to give up her support network and those she cares about to come here where I have nothing just isnt fair. We absolutely love one another. We aren't worried about the strength of our relationship or our ability to maintain one another. We're happy- we'd just be happier together physically. The whole system is designed to be as difficult and punishing for poor people as possible. We've been trying to do this for years, and only just managed to get married after so long LAST YEAR. I'm only getting older and slower and more and more tired as time goes on. We can't afford an immigration lawyer. We can't wrap our heads around the paperwork without one. We can't find time to work on anything to do with it between work and life and money and timezones. Every time we visit one another we have to stop the proverbial clock on our own lives, and in my case, reset it back to zero every time as I need to leave my work and my life and start again every time I come home to an empty apartment and a storage locker because I can only visit her for three months at a time. I live within my means but can never save a penny, I make my rent and bills just barely, but I'm not creating anymore. I'm not living for anything. I've lost my passion to write, to paint, to play. I hate my existence. I keep up the pretense for her. I just want to fall asleep and disappear into the void. I have suffered from severe anxiety and depression for decades, and believe I'm undiagnosed ADHD, with a waitlist on the NHS of several years its pointless even trying to get an assessment. I wakeup every day wishing I hadnt. Just screaming into a pillow. Highly unlikely for anyone to see it anyway. This is NOT a goodbye note. I am not suicidal. I have ideation. Theres a difference. I will not give up. I will not give in. I'd do this for another forty years if I got to see her in person for just five more minutes. I'm just so tired of being sick and tired and needed to vent somewhere where I'm not particularly well known. EDIT: This is a very genuine post for those of you querying that. Just wanted to leave my thanks for all the suggestions, information and support. I didnt expect this to blow up. I just wanted to vent. To those of you offering help, I'll do my best to respond to you each in turn.
item.dc:creator: Hammerdiddlestrokemyfiddle

item.title: The same picture every day. Day 4
item.dc:creator: bexxMaker

item.title: Princess Bride is clearly the superior format.
item.description:
Yeah this works but...
This is clearly the better of the two. Edit: Wow! This is seriously my first most viral post?! Do we still ask for the thing? If so send bewbs. My wife's a bewb girl. Otherwise send a nice drink you like to enjoy. Remember, all we got is each other on this rock. Let's try to make it a bit nicer each day.
item.dc:creator: Ryebread91
